title: Special authority for the secretary with respect to certain military service in the uniformed services
doc_html:
§292.3. Special authority for the secretary with respect to certain military service in the uniformed services

           Notwithstanding any other provision of law to the contrary, the secretary may grant certain relief to persons in the uniformed services for service in the uniformed services as defined in R.S. 29:403(9) to the full extent of such relief granted by federal law.

           Acts 2001, 2nd Ex. Sess., No. 6, §1, eff. Oct. 16, 2001.
doc_text:
§292.3.  Special authority for the secretary with respect to certain military
service in the uniformed services
Notwithstanding any other provision of law to the contrary, the
secretary may grant certain relief to persons in the uniformed services for
service in the uniformed services as defined in R.S. 29:403(9) to the full extent
of such relief granted by federal law.
Acts 2001, 2nd Ex. Sess., No. 6, §1, eff. Oct. 16, 2001.
